evals.prompt: I want to screen and rank 3 of my candidates against the VP Technology role - specifically Adrian Moretti, Gavin Pathross, and Emily Carter. Use gem_lite to keep costs down.
evals.expected_output: Identifies the context and candidates, confirms credit cost (5+3=8 per candidate x 3 = 24 credits), runs batch GEM lite and JD-FIT, presents a ranked shortlist table with scores and recommendations.

assertions.name: lists_context_and_candidates
assertions.description: Calls atlas_list_contexts and atlas_list_candidates to find the data

assertions.name: confirms_cost_before_running
assertions.description: Shows total credit cost and asks for confirmation before running batch operations

assertions.name: runs_batch_gem
assertions.description: Calls atlas_start_batch_gem with correct candidate IDs and gem_lite type

assertions.name: presents_ranked_table
assertions.description: Shows a ranked table with candidate names, GEM scores, FIT scores, strengths, and gaps
